personas.name: Jordan R.
goals: Start and complete assigned work orders quickly
Capture accurate evidence (photos, barcodes) even when offline
Get routes to next job with minimal battery impact
frustrations: Previous app lost unsaved notes when the OS killed it in background
Camera/Scanner crashed and asked for permissions at first launch
Outbox was hidden; unsure if updates synced

personas.name: Alex P.
goals: See schedule board and technician statuses
Reassign work orders and approve timesheets
Locate technicians without draining their batteries
frustrations: Previous locator feature drained batteries due to aggressive GPS
Push notifications were noisy and lacked grouping/actions
Deep links from emails sometimes opened the wrong screen

accessibility.focus_order: predictable for keyboard users on tablets

personas.connectivity: mostly LTE/Wi‑Fi, occasional dead zones on-site
